subcodes.first_line: Man must consult in all matters, whether major or minor, so that he may become cognizant of what is good.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جمع در امور جزای و کلی انسان باید مشورت نماید تا بآنچه موافق است اطلاع
subcodes.subjects: @consultation, @importance of community building, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
